revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[8世紀]]日本の[[詩人]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:8世紀の詩人|にほん]] [[Category:8世紀日本の著作家|ししん]] Categ…」

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Removing from [[Category:Adding Category to uncategorized categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized" to "qq"
Bot: tidy & size tag (3 members)
Text replacement - "\{\{draft categories\|[^]]+\}\}" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|[^]]}}</noinclude>"
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:8世紀日本の詩人]] [[ar:Category:شعراء يابانيون في القرن 8]] [[es:Category:Poetas de Japón del siglo VIII]] [[fa:Category:شاعران سده ۸ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Shimotsukeno no Mushimaro]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:
